note: Render web-service compute plans (per always-on instance) and bandwidth overage. Workspace subscription (Hobby free / Pro $25 / Scale $499) is separate. Standard ($25, 1 vCPU / 2 GB) covers most non-prod workloads. Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: Compute plans: Starter $7, Standard $25, Pro $85, Pro Plus $175; bandwidth overage $0.15/GB
New workspace plans (Apr 2026): Hobby free, Pro $25, Scale $499; included bandwidth 5/25 GB
